title: FOOD PANTRIES - 211info
text: FISH FOOD BANK CASCADE LOCKS FOOD PANTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 3-5 day supply of emergency food. Pet food is sometimes available. Donations are accepted. 140 SW Wa Na Pa Street Cascade Locks, OR 97014 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: 4th Wednesday of the month 2pm-6pm and Saturday following 4th Wednesday 11am-noon. Check for holiday hours in November, December, and January. Email (541) 386-3474 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-3474 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, visit website, or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Mid-Columbia Area (Hood River, Klickitat, Sherman, Skamania, and Wasco Counties) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Cascade Locks City Hall gymnasium Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
